calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-15-2024 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Answer To Plaintiff Complaint For Declaratory Relief; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Aug-08-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. TENNY MIRZAYAN, Esq. of Keller, Fishback & Jackson LLP (818-342-7442) for Plaintiff.
Atty. PETER FELSENFELD, Esq. of Hinshaw & Culbertson LLP (tel: 415-362-6000) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT KAREN CROSBY's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Answer To Plaintiff Complaint For Declaratory Relief.

Matter not argued/contested. Counsel Peter Felsenfeld informs the Court that the parties have reached a settelement. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's unopposed motion for leave to file first amended answer is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2024 Set For Trial On Jan-13-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
